channel.title: vapour-liquid equilibria; triamines; enthalpy of vaporisation; nrtl;uniquac on LMI

item.title: Vapour-Liquid Equilibria, Enthalpy Of Vaporisation, And Excess Gibbsenergies Of Binary Mixtures Of 3,3-Diamino-N-Methyldipropylamine (Dnm)( Or N,N,N `,N `',N `'-Pentamethyldiethylenetriamine (Pmdeta)) Pluswater
